ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the wine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the wine */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Rating points assigned to the wine */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the wine */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province from which the wine originates */,
  "region_1" INTEGER /* Primary region of the wine */,
  "region_2" TEXT /* Secondary region of the wine */,
  "variety" INTEGER /* Type of grape variety used */,
  "winery" INTEGER /* Winery producing the wine */,
  "vintage_year" INTEGER /* Year of the wine's vintage */,
  "bottle_size" TEXT /* Size of the bottle */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Percentage of alcohol in the wine */,
  "importer" TEXT /* Name of the importer */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the wine is organic */,
  "is_biodynamic" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the wine is biodynamic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region_1 FOREIGN KEY ("region_1") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_variety FOREIGN KEY ("variety") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_winery FOREIGN KEY ("winery") REFERENCES winery ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., appellation, terroir) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grape variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the grape variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grape variety */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Country or region of origin for the grape variety */,
  "sugar_content" REAL /* Sugar content level of the grape variety */,
  "acidity_level" REAL /* Acidity level of the grape variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "winery" (
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winery */,
  "winery_name" TEXT /* Name of the winery */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the winery */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the winery was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the winery */,
  "total_production" INTEGER /* Annual production capacity of the winery in liters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales staff, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of wine sold */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the quantity sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the wine */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market or region where the sale occurred */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the wine available in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the wine should be reordered */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the wine in days */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last checked */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the wine is stored (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the wine */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the user about the wine */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., professional critic, consumer) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., taste, value, overall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine whose price is changing */,
  "old_price" REAL /* Old price before change */,
  "new_price" REAL /* New price after change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market or region where the price change was applied */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the price change (e.g., cost increase, promotional discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_history_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales forecast record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being forecasted */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the sales are forecasted */,
  "predicted_sales" INTEGER /* Predicted number of sales */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "forecast_source" TEXT /* Source of the sales forecast (e.g., AI model, expert analysis) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the forecast (e.g., time series analysis, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_forecast_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine related to the compliance record */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date of the last compliance check */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for ensuring compliance */,
  "next_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the next compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_compliance_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)
